reasoning: The technical structure has shifted from expansion to distribution following the $74k peak. The 1h chart shows a consolidation pennant with significant volume-price divergence; price is rising toward the apex on declining volume, indicating buyer exhaustion. The Point of Control (POC) at 67,991.20 is currently acting as a distribution pivot rather than firm support. On the 15m chart, multiple rejections above $69k suggest a liquidity trap for late longs. A breakdown below the POC targets the Value Area Low (VAL) at approximately 63,500, where a major liquidity gap exists. The trade offers a 3.0 Reward-to-Risk ratio.
reasoning_zh: 技术结构在 7.4 万美元见顶后已从扩张转向派发。1 小时图显示三角旗形整理伴随明显的量价背离：价格向顶点移动但成交量持续萎缩，显示买盘枯竭。控制点 (POC) 67,991.20 目前更像是派发中轴而非坚实支撑。15 分钟图在 6.9 万美元上方的多次受阻暗示了针对多头的流动性陷阱。一旦放量跌破 POC，价格将下探至价值区低点 (VAL) 约 63,500 美元附近的流动性真空区。该交易方案提供了 3.0 的盈亏比。
